title: Addis Cutlery Drainer (One Size) (Linen)
features: With drainage holes for quick drying.
Free standing or can be slotted on to draining rack.
description: From the manufacturer Made For Life. Addis part of the home since 1780, based in UK. Addis has a 240+ year old history of design, manufacturing and supplying of housewares. The Addis brand still stands today - as it has for previous generations - for value and quality. BPA Free Made from BPA free plastic which ensures no harsh chemicals are emitted. 4 Compartments This linen cutlery drainer has 4 compartments which is perfect for splitting your cutlery into categories as it drains, making it easier to put away. Matching Set This cutlery drainer looks aesthetic in any sink side setting - but even more so when you match it with the Addis linen plate drainer.

specifications_table.Item Type Name: Cutlery Utensil Drainer Caddy with 4 compartments, Linen Cream
